GRAIN DATA MATRIX

ID COLOR NOTE FREQ TIMBRE OFFSET CREATED ACTION
SYSTEM CAPABILITIES

1. GRANULAR SAMPLING

REC MIC / VID: Capture audio or video to create a "cloud" of grains.

DRAG & DROP: Import local audio or video files.

ANALYSIS: The system extracts Pitch, Timbre (Centroid), and Amplitude to map grains in 3D space.

2. 3D VISUALIZATION

AXES: Time (Z), Pitch (Y), Timbre (X).

NAV: Mouse to Orbit. [Z/Q/S/D] or [W/A/S/D] to Move. [Scroll] to Zoom.

INTERACT: Hover over grains to audition them.

3. PERFORMANCE MODES

TRANS (TRANSFER): Use your microphone to drive playback. The system finds grains that match your voice's pitch and timbre in real-time.

SCATTER (2D): Switch views (Num 4) to play grains using a 2D chaos pad.

HARMO: In TRANS mode, plays chords of related grains instead of single grains.

4. SPATIAL & VIDEO

SPATIAL: Position sound in 3D (Binaural/Stereo). Draw paths for auto-movement.

VIDEO: Grains captured from video playback as synced visual snapshots.

SHORTCUTS: [SPACE] Play/Pause | [M] Mute | [R] Reset Cam
